about.paragraph1: I am a front-end developer focused on React, TypeScript, and JavaScript.
about.paragraph2: I enjoy building web interfaces that are clear, functional, and well-structured.
about.paragraph3Start: I work primarily on component-based application architecture, consuming REST APIs, and
about.paragraph3End: always aiming to write organized, maintainable code.
about.paragraph4: In my projects, I explore concepts such as authentication, state management, and real-time data integration. I am also familiar with back-end development using Node.js, particularly in creating and consuming APIs.

projects.description1: Task manager for everyday professional use.
